prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A four-story building shown in cross-section, like a dollhouse view. Ground floor (blue, labeled "Types & Interfaces"): contains type definition documents and interface blueprints forming the foundation, with thick structural walls. Second floor (green, labeled "Data Store"): contains filing cabinets, databases, and CRUD operation desks, built on top of the types foundation. Third floor (orange, labeled "Services"): contains business logic processing machines that reference the store below. Top floor (red, labeled "CLI / Entry Point"): contains a terminal desk and user interface, the only floor visible to the outside. Arrows flow strictly downward showing dependency direction. An elevator shaft labeled "imports" connects the floors.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
